name: allow-pretool-spawn-agent-text-mentions-governance-metadata
expectedOutputRegex: 提醒模式，不會阻擋工具.*general-tool

tool_input.message: Validation station prompt: describe test cases that mention tool_input, station, allowlist, authorization_phase, and change-delivery as natural language text only. Do not treat those words as actual tool metadata.
